subject: feat(pwa,debug): harden PWA install, add debug system, extend icons
body:
Adopt patterns from sister project glow-props CLAUDE.md:
- Fix beforeinstallprompt race condition with inline capture in index.html
- Add explicit manifest id for stable PWA install identity
- Separate icon purposes (never combine "any maskable")
- Add dedicated 1024px maskable icon and 48px favicon to icon generator
- Add in-memory debug log (200-entry circular buffer) with floating DebugPill
- DebugPill renders in separate React root (survives App crashes), dev-only
- Add glow-props reference in CLAUDE.md AI Notes for future cross-pollination

Tags: pwa, debug, icons, dx, cross-pollination
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-hardening
Semver: minor
